name: Nextra (Next.js Documentation Framework)

performance.notes: Next.js static generation; fast page loads

agent_readiness.notes: Next.js documentation/blog framework by Vercel's Shu Ding. MDX with custom components. Two themes: Docs theme (sidebar, TOC, search) and Blog theme. File-based routing. _meta.json for sidebar ordering. Flexsearch for client-side search. React components in markdown. Used by SWR, Turbo, and Vercel's own docs. v3 rewrites with App Router support. Simpler than Docusaurus for Next.js teams. Less opinionated than Fumadocs. Vercel-hosted optimization.

gotchas: v3 breaking changes from v2 (App Router migration)
Less feature-rich than Fumadocs for complex docs
Flexsearch less capable than Algolia DocSearch
best_when: Next.js teams wanting simple documentation with minimal setup
Projects that already know MDX and Next.js
avoid_when: Need advanced search (use Algolia or Fumadocs with Orama)
Large documentation sites needing Docusaurus plugin ecosystem
summary: Nextra is a simple Next.js documentation framework by Shu Ding / Vercel. MDX with Docs theme (sidebar, TOC, Flexsearch) and Blog theme. File-based routing, _meta.json sidebar order. Used by SWR, Turbo. v3 adds App Router. Simpler than Fumadocs but less full-featured. Best for Next.js teams wanting documentation with minimal setup. Fumadocs for OpenAPI integration; Docusaurus for large plugin ecosystems.
